generated.as: CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN tenant_id ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN lifecycle = 'active' AND archived = false THEN tenant_id ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN binding_id ELSE NULL END

ddl.value:
(
        (`simas_application`.`status` = 'pending' AND `simas_application`.`decided_at` IS NULL AND `simas_application`.`decided_by_provider_admin_id` IS NULL AND `simas_application`.`rejection_reason` IS NULL AND `simas_application`.`approved_tenant_id` IS NULL)
        OR (`simas_application`.`status` = 'approved' AND `simas_application`.`decided_at` IS NOT NULL AND `simas_application`.`decided_by_provider_admin_id` IS NOT NULL AND `simas_application`.`rejection_reason` IS NULL AND `simas_application`.`approved_tenant_id` IS NOT NULL)
        OR (`simas_application`.`status` = 'rejected' AND `simas_application`.`decided_at` IS NOT NULL AND `simas_application`.`decided_by_provider_admin_id` IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(`simas_application`.`rejection_reason`)) > 0 AND `simas_application`.`approved_tenant_id` IS NULL)
      )
ddl.name: simas_application_decision_state_check

ddl.value: ((`temporary_credential_activation`.`password_change_required` = true AND `temporary_credential_activation`.`password_changed_at` IS NULL) OR (`temporary_credential_activation`.`password_change_required` = false AND `temporary_credential_activation`.`password_changed_at` IS NOT NULL))
ddl.name: temporary_credential_activation_password_state_check

ddl.value:
(
        (`tenant`.`onboarding_completed_at` IS NULL AND `tenant`.`trial_started_at` IS NULL AND `tenant`.`trial_ends_at` IS NULL)
        OR (`tenant`.`onboarding_completed_at` IS NOT NULL AND `tenant`.`trial_started_at` = `tenant`.`onboarding_completed_at` AND `tenant`.`trial_ends_at` = DATE_ADD(`tenant`.`trial_started_at`, INTERVAL 1 MONTH))
      )
ddl.name: tenant_onboarding_trial_state_check
